_comment: Smoke-test optimized sweep for Llama 3 8B on TPU v7x. 2 combos.
Goal: validate that the chunk-prefill optimization activates and
produces a metrics.txt at two K values (one mid-range, one max).
Coupled axes pin (K, BLOCK_SIZE, RPA_P_BLOCK_SIZES) triples taken
the all-three-flavors tune that replaced the PREFILL-only round.
RPA_D_BLOCK_SIZES and RPA_M_BLOCK_SIZES are also pinned to the
same tunes page=128 winners — necessary because the optimized
path produces traffic in all three buckets (DECODE for ongoing
decodes, PREFILL for chunked prefill, MIXED for residual).
NUM_PROMPTS=100 keep the smoke run fast. The 1800-token prompts
+ 128-token outputs from the case file fit comfortably.
